Vendors

146 manufacturers contribute 1098 devices to the repository. Every device profile and payload codec is reviewed before it is published.

The LoRaWAN® Device Repository is an open-source catalog of end devices, payload codecs and vendor profiles, maintained by The Things Network community and The Things Industries.

The Things Network The Things Stack docs GitHub
